column1: 失敗したら、またやり直すまでだ。
column2: しっぱいしたら、またやりなおすまでだ。
column3: If I fail, all I have to do is try again.
column4: 〜るまでだ (all I have to do is ~, the only thing left is ~)
column5: Verb[dict] + までだ / までのことだ
column6: expresses a simple, final resolve: 'all there is to it is doing X'; can be a calm acceptance or a determined fallback
column8: 〜るまでだ = calm resolve to just do X; たまでだ = just did (minimizing past action); しかない = no choice but; ばいい = just need to
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:～るまでだ source:authored scaffold:pending-audio
